info.title: Ui API
info.description: Aggregate OpenAPI 3.1 document for all enterprise modules, generated from FCG InterfaceSpecs.

get.description:
Get screen by ID
Must come after more specific routes like /url and /feature/:featureId

get.summary: Get workspaces accessible to a user based on role assignments
get.description:
Get workspaces accessible to a user based on role assignments
Complex business logic: user -> userRoleSelections -> roleWorkspaceSelections -> workspaces

get.summary: Get user's active workspace (with fallback to role default)
get.description:
Get user's active workspace (with fallback to role default)
Business logic: checks lastActiveWorkspaceId, falls back to role default

put.description:
Update user's active workspace
Business logic: validates user has access, updates user record

get.summary: Get navigation items for a workspace (hierarchical tree building)
get.description:
Get navigation items for a workspace (hierarchical tree building)
Business logic: builds parent-child relationships and sorts by order

post.description:
Clone workspace with navigation (deep cloning)
Business logic: clones workspace and all navigation items recursively

get.summary: Get screen by URL with pattern matching
get.description:
Get screen by URL with pattern matching
URL routing with pattern matching (exact and dynamic patterns)
Supports dynamic routes (e.g., /users/:id -> /users/123)
Must come before /ui/screens/:id to avoid route conflicts

Get screens by feature (convenience query)
Must come before /ui/screens/:id to avoid route conflicts

get.summary: Batch: all screens (optionally workspace-scoped) with their components
get.description:
Batch: all screens (optionally workspace-scoped) with their components
populated in a single round trip. One screens query + one screenComponents
$in query, regardless of how many screens are in the workspace. The SPA's
prefetcher calls this on login instead of issuing N parallel getScreenById
requests.

Must come before /ui/screens/:id to avoid route conflicts — declaration
order matters here.

post.summary: Clone a screen with all its components (deep cloning)
post.description:
Clone a screen with all its components (deep cloning)
Maintains component relationships and parentLayoutId references

post.summary: Save screen and components to Account DB (master/backup state)
post.description:
Save screen and components to Account DB (master/backup state)
Creates a master backup of the screen configuration on first save

delete.summary: Reset screen customization (deletes user customization, falls back to Account DB)
delete.description:
Reset screen customization (deletes user customization, falls back to Account DB)
Restores the screen to its master/default state from backup

post.summary: Generate a Flyway migration script by diffing local DB against the local reference DB
post.description:
Generate a Flyway migration script by diffing local DB against the local reference DB.

Only available in local environments — the reference DB (Enterprise_ref / <tenant>_ref)
is populated by running 'npm run db:sync-ref' which dumps from DEV.

Returns the filename and path written to db/migration/, plus validation result.

Add component to screen
Custom validation and relationship setup

put.summary: Update component layout (position, size, priority updates)
put.description:
Update component layout (position, size, priority updates)
Layout positioning logic for mobile stacking

delete.description:
Remove component from screen
Cascade deletion handling

post.summary: Save a personal component for everyone (promote to shared scope on the base screen)
post.description: Save a personal component for everyone (promote to shared scope on the base screen)

Populate screen components
Component loading and sorting by priority for mobile stacking

get.description:
Get screen templates by type
Filter screens by template type flags (isDashboard, isListing, isDetail)

dataSource.description: Optional configuration: { screenId?: string } - Link to custom detail screen

layout.description: Layout key to use for this screen

actions.description: Custom action buttons for this screen (array of action objects)

comingSoon.description: When true, this screen is not yet available and shows a Coming Soon placeholder

mapScreen.description: When enabled, removes padding/margins and overlays screen icon and title in upper left

fullScreen.description: When enabled, keeps header/actions visible but makes the grid fill remaining height

maxWidth.description: Maximum width for screen content (e.g., "1200px", "80rem"). When set, centers content with auto margins on sides.

enableTitle.description: When false, hides the screen title. Default is true.

enablePrimaryActionBar.description: When false, hides the primary action bar. Default is true.

requiredPermissions.description: Permissions required to access this screen

feature.description: Feature this screen belongs to (e.g. ui-screens)

isDetail.description: When true, this screen is a detail/record view (not a listing)

masterBackup.description: Backup of the original screen configuration before customization

masterBackupDate.description: Timestamp when the master backup was created

variant.description: Badge color variant used when displaying this resolution

default.description: When true, this resolution is pre-selected when an editor opens the dropdown on a new ticket

sortOrder.description: Display order in selection lists (lower = first)

enterpriseProductAnnouncement.description: Parent enterpriseProductAnnouncements this file link belongs to
Parent enterpriseProductAnnouncements this note link belongs to

colorMode.description: UI color theme applied to the workspace

flyoutBehaviour.description: Controls whether record links open in a fly-out panel or a new page

notif_mention.description: Someone @mentions you in a note, comment, or activity. [push, email]

notif_taskAssigned.description: A task is assigned to you. [push, email]

notif_taskDue.description: Reminder before a task assigned to you is due. [push, email]

notif_recordAssigned.description: Ownership of a record is transferred to you. [push, email]

notif_recordUpdated.description: A record you own is modified by another user. [push, email]

notif_dealStage.description: A deal you own moves to a different pipeline stage. [push, email]

notif_dealClosed.description: A deal you own is marked as won or lost. [push, email]

notif_inboxEmail.description: An inbound email is linked to a record you own. [push, email]

notif_insight.description: The system surfaces a new AI insight relevant to your records. [push, email]

notif_automationFailure.description: An automation workflow you created encounters an execution error. [push, email]

scope.description: Whether this row holds user or account preferences

scopeRecordModelKey.description: Model key of the scoped record (users, enterpriseAccounts)

websiteHeader.description: HTML content for the site header

websiteFooter.description: HTML content for the site footer

accountUrl.description: Public URL for this tenant (e.g. https://account1.enterprisecrmdev.com). Replaces the deprecated FRONTEND_URL env var.

gmailRedirectUri.description: OAuth2 redirect URI registered with Google for Gmail integration. Replaces the deprecated GOOGLE_GMAIL_REDIRECT_URI env var.

subtitle.description: Descriptive sub-text shown below the headline

status.description: Only announcements with status "active" are displayed on the home screen

forwardRecordId.description: Field key whose value is forwarded as a query param when navigating

description.description: Internal description of what this action does

hideInFlyout.description: When enabled, this action is hidden in the flyout panel and only appears on the full detail page.

primary.description: When enabled, renders as the primary CTA button in the action bar

name.description: Display name shown on the draft card

draftType.description: Category of the draft — matches the source model

modelKey.description: Key of the source model (e.g. opportunities, contacts)

referenceId.description: ID of the source record — null if not yet saved

thumbnailUrl.description: Optional hero/thumbnail image URL for the card

dateRange.description: Formatted date range shown on the card (createdByDate ~ updatedByDate)

title.description: Display name of the viewed record

subtitle.description: Secondary label shown below the title (e.g. model type name)

subtitleIcon.description: Phosphor icon key shown alongside subtitle

description.description: Secondary line shown on the thumbnail card (e.g. "Last viewed 2 days ago")

emoji.description: Avatar/emoji shown on the thumbnail card — { type: "image", value: "/avatars/1.jpeg" }

url.description: Navigation URL to the viewed record

thumbnailUrl.description: Optional image URL for the thumbnail card

description.description: Description of what the component does

iconId.description: Icon for the component from the icons database

configFields.description: Array of configuration field definitions for the component

defaultConfig.description: Default configuration values for the component

resizable.description: Whether the component can be resized in the screen builder

requiresData.description: Whether the component requires data to function

isNew.description: Whether to show a "new" badge on this component in the gallery

description.description: Description of what this status represents

variant.description: Color variant for status badge/chip display (matches Chip component variants)

status.description: Whether this screen status is active

screen.description: Parent screens this task link belongs to

supportTicket.description: Parent support ticket this task link belongs to
Parent support ticket this file link belongs to

dataSource.description: Optional configuration: { screenId?: string } - Link to custom detail screen

layout.description: Layout key to use for this screen

actions.description: Custom action buttons for this screen (array of action objects)

comingSoon.description: When true, this screen is not yet available and shows a Coming Soon placeholder

mapScreen.description: When enabled, removes padding/margins and overlays screen icon and title in upper left

fullScreen.description: When enabled, keeps header/actions visible but makes the grid fill remaining height

maxWidth.description: Maximum width for screen content (e.g., "1200px", "80rem"). When set, centers content with auto margins on sides.

enableTitle.description: When false, hides the screen title. Default is true.

enablePrimaryActionBar.description: When false, hides the primary action bar. Default is true.

requiredPermissions.description: Permissions required to access this screen

feature.description: Feature this screen belongs to (e.g. ui-screens)

isDetail.description: When true, this screen is a detail/record view (not a listing)

masterBackup.description: Backup of the original screen configuration before customization

masterBackupDate.description: Timestamp when the master backup was created

logo.description: Emoji or icon for the workspace
